roles.purpose: Review market structure and cross-asset context without treating external data as Source of Truth.
primary_questions: Did market structure support risk compression?
Are NVDA, GOOG, GLD, BTC, ETH, SOL, and DOGE context aligned with the residual-core posture?
roles.validation_rule: Market Analyst is advisory, static, read-only, and non-customer-facing.

roles.purpose: Review cash defense, residual exposure, no-reentry rules, and drawdown controls.
primary_questions: Are residual core positions and no-reentry rules visible?
roles.validation_rule: Risk Officer must require warnings and data quality, but cannot execute or mutate.

roles.purpose: Verify Source-of-Truth hierarchy, quote type, screenshot evidence, freshness, and non-promoted evidence labels.
primary_questions: Are source priority and quote type visible?
roles.validation_rule: Data Verifier must require source traceability and remains read-only.

roles.purpose: Review rule logic, no-reentry discipline, residual-core mode, and rule-compliance versus opportunity-cost separation.
primary_questions: Did the strategy respect no-reentry discipline?
Are residual core and cash defense modes represented correctly?
roles.validation_rule: Strategist / Meta Strategist cannot execute or mutate.

roles.purpose: Review scores, execution discipline, account-structure improvement, information completeness, and order-detail completeness.
primary_questions: Are execution discipline and information completeness separated?
Did order detail completeness resolve prior gaps?
roles.validation_rule: Review Officer remains static and read-only.

roles.purpose: Arbitrate AI Board disagreements and produce a read-only final judgement trace.
primary_questions: Which evidence and role outputs support it?
roles.validation_rule: Final Commander may arbitrate but cannot execute, mutate runtime, or expose customer-facing output.
